title: Amtech L2200 2 Piece bit Holder and Adaptor Set
features: VERSATILE: 2 piece bit holder and adaptor set includes a 60mm 1/4" hex to 1/4" square drive and a 65mm 1/4" hex 1/4" hex to magnetic drive
NOTE: They are not suitable for use with impact drivers or wrenches
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 2Pc Bit Holder And Adaptor Set See more
